title: AI at the Edge: The Real State of Play - Agents, Systems, and the Next Operational Layer
subtitle: From Inference to Action
series: AI at the Edge: The Real State of Play
author: Keith Szot
description: A deep look at operational AI agents at the edge, covering control loops, loop placement across edge and cloud, orchestration frameworks, MCP and A2A connectivity, observability, governance, and real-world deployment patterns across retail, logistics, hospitality, kitchens, and clinical environments.
